name: Jade Leech
description:
!Body dysmorphia comfort

"I have always found it rather fascinating—how different one's reflection can appear depending on the medium in which it is viewed. A mirror, for instance, will show you one thing. A still pond, another. And, of course, if you were to look into the ocean, the image would shift constantly, never quite allowing you to see yourself clearly."
creator: goldenbunnyrabbit
